systemAnalysis.systemImpact: The changes will enable data synchronization from Mautic to SuiteCRM. A Mautic cache clear is required, which can cause a brief moment of slowness. No downtime is expected. Misconfiguration can lead to failed or incorrect data synchronization.
externalDependencies: A running SuiteCRM instance with API credentials.
The Mautic SuiteCRM integration plugin must be installed.

executionSteps.description: Create the field mapping configuration file. This file will define how Mautic contact fields map to SuiteCRM contact fields.
Update the Mautic local configuration file to enable and configure the SuiteCRM plugin.

files.change: Append the following configuration to the return array in the file. Replace placeholders with actual SuiteCRM credentials.

executionSteps.description: Provide the content to be appended to `mautic/app/config/local.php`
commands:
MAUTIC_CONFIG_CONTENT='
    "plugin_suitecrm_enabled" => true,
    "suitecrm_url" => "https://your-suitecrm-instance.com",
    "suitecrm_username" => "admin",
    "suitecrm_password" => "your-secret-password",
    "suitecrm_field_mapping_file" => "/var/www/html/app/config/suitecrm_field_mapping.json",
    "suitecrm_sync_email_opens" => true,
    "suitecrm_sync_email_clicks" => true,
    "suitecrm_sync_form_submissions" => true,
    "suitecrm_sync_lead_score_changes" => true,
    "suitecrm_sync_campaign_membership" => true,
'

executionSteps.description: Clear the Mautic cache to apply the configuration changes.

rollbackPlan: Step 1: Revert the changes in `mautic/app/config/local.php` by removing the added lines.
Step 3: Run `docker-compose exec -T mautic php /var/www/html/bin/console cache:clear` to clear the cache.
